channel.title: Comments for page "Ombres Malvants: 1) Tooth and Claw"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Ombres Malvants: 1) Tooth and Claw"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
P. Sully is back at it again.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is my favourite OCT entry so far, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks Slambo! Glad you enjoyed it.

As to the typo, I missed nothing, but I had an extra pronoun which has now been deleted :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
If there's anyone here that can make a single conversation gripping and engaging, it's you, psul. +1

Also…

Because there are I things that even I do not know

I believe you missed something here. >.>

item.title: Original Character Tournament - Tomas Rey
item.content:encoded:
Here is my entry for Round One of the Original Character Tournament. Tomas Rey is about to join the Foundation, but there is more going on in Barcelona than just his final training exercise.

Thanks very much to PeppersGhost for organising the tournament, and to Westrin for the use of Tree Critter. This has been fun, and I hope there's a chance to continue the story!

Edit: you can read Part Two of this story ("blue pills", starring dado!) here!
